title: LocatorCache
description: Per-run cache of resolved TBD locators populated by the JIT runtime plugin during Step 9 test execution. Survives across `--from-step 9` re-runs. Each entry records how the selector was sourced (dev-supplied file vs cached vs LLM-resolved vs HITL) for downstream reporting and traceability.

key.description: Stable hash of (test_file, constant_name, intent) used for cache lookup.

test_file.description: SUT-relative path of the test/POM file that owns the TBD constant. Null when the cache entry was pre-resolved without a specific test context.

constant_name.description: Locator constant name as declared in the SUT (e.g. LOGIN_BUTTON).

intent.description: Human-readable description of the locator's purpose, passed to tbd(...) at codegen time.

selector.description: Resolved selector. Null when the entry represents an unresolvable TBD (resolver returned no match).

source.description: Where this entry came from. `dev_verified` = supplied by the dev file AND confirmed by Playwright count()>0 at first access. `dev_unverified` = present in dev file, not yet exercised at runtime. `cached` = hit on a previous run. `agent` = LLM-resolved via `worca-t resolve`. `hitl` = user-supplied via interactive prompt. `unresolvable` = resolver gave up after bounded retry.

page_url.description: URL of the page at resolution time (best-effort; aids debugging).

snapshot_hash.description: sha256 of the AOM snapshot that was the basis for the resolution. Lets the report show whether two resolutions reused the same snapshot.
